name: PM Vibe Agent Run
persona: A PM at a 30–200 person B2B SaaS company triaging a sudden KPI spike/drop in Slack and needing a coordinated first-hour investigation plan without a formal data-on-call process
problem_statement: When a KPI moves suddenly, PMs default to ad hoc checks and underspecified analyst asks, causing missed hypothesis categories and slow, noisy investigation loops
artifact_type: single-page web app that generates a structured anomaly investigation run plan (checklist + brief export)
